targets.query: SELECT "value_mmol" FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Glucose laatste 6 uur
panels.description: Ruwe glucosemetingen uit xDrip/Influx, zonder forecast. Gebruik deze voor de echte geschiedenis.

targets.query: SELECT last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m) fill(none)

panels.title: Trend
panels.description: Trend uit gemeten glucose; geen voorspelling.

targets.query: SELECT (last(mean) - 4.0) / -last(derivative) FROM (SELECT mean("value_mmol"), DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m) fill(none))
SELECT max("value_mmol") - last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT 100 * (max("value_mmol") - last("value_mmol")) / max("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)
SELECT count("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value_mmol" < 4.0 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT count("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value_mmol" < 4.5 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT count("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value_mmol" > 10.0 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT "rate_5m" FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Daling / stijging snelheid
panels.description: Rate 5m uit xDrip: negatief is daling, positief is stijging. Lijnen markeren snelle en zeer snelle beweging.

targets.query: SELECT min("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT max("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 5m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)

SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)) WHERE "derivative" < -0.0555 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)) WHERE "derivative" < -0.111 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)) WHERE "derivative" > 0.0555 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(none)) WHERE "derivative" > 0.111 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT last("value_mgdl") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("direction") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("rate_5m") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("delta") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("noise") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT count("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value_mmol" >= 4.0 AND "value_mmol" <= 10.0 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

panels.description: Voorspelling uit glucose_forecast; dit is het enige deel van het dashboard dat vooruit kijkt.

targets.query: SELECT last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose_forecast" WHERE time >= now() + 8m AND time <= now() + 12m

panels.title: +10m

panels.description: Voorspelling uit glucose_forecast; dit is het enige deel van het dashboard dat vooruit kijkt.

targets.query: SELECT last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose_forecast" WHERE time >= now() + 18m AND time <= now() + 22m

panels.title: +20m

panels.description: Voorspelling uit glucose_forecast; dit is het enige deel van het dashboard dat vooruit kijkt.

targets.query: SELECT last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose_forecast" WHERE time >= now() + 28m AND time <= now() + 32m

panels.title: +30m

panels.description: Langere voorspelling uit glucose_forecast; trendindicatie, minder betrouwbaar dan 10/20/30m.

targets.query: SELECT last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose_forecast" WHERE time >= now() + 43m AND time <= now() + 47m

panels.title: +45m

panels.description: Langere voorspelling uit glucose_forecast; trendindicatie, minder betrouwbaar dan 10/20/30m.

targets.query: SELECT last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose_forecast" WHERE time >= now() + 58m AND time <= now() + 62m

panels.title: +60m

panels.description: Groen is actueel tot nu; oranje stippellijn is alleen de berekende voorspelling tot 60 minuten vooruit.

targets.query: SELECT "value_mmol" FROM "glucose" WHERE time >= now() - 2h AND time <= now()
SELECT "value_mmol" FROM "glucose_forecast" WHERE time >= now() AND time <= now() + 60m

panels.title: Forecast vooruit 60 minuten
